name: Untangling Housing Affordability and Groundwater Regulation
description: Explainer on whether a 2023 prohibition on groundwater reliant development could impact housing affordability
resource_description: Explainer on how limitations on groundwater reliant housing development impacts housing affordability

name: Enduring Solutions on the Colorado River
description: Analysis of how increasing "assigned water" in Lake Mead could impact Colorado River water rights holders
resource_description: Analysis of how proposals to allow entities to store water in Lake Mead will affect water availability across the Lower Basin

name: Groundwater Protection in the Valley of the Sun
description: History of Phoenix-area urban users' shift from reliance on groundwater, analysis of the impacts of Colorado River shortage on groundwater supplies and recommendations for improved groundwater management
resource_description: History of central Arizona's move away from groundwater reliant development and investments in surface water treatment plants and aquifer recharge; analysis of tradeoffs inherent in continued reliance on groundwater; suggestions for policy changes to improve groundwater protection

name: Northern Arizona Water Affordability Study
description: Analysis of tap water affordability among tribal and non-tribal communities in Northern Arizona
resource_description: Report on tap water affordability of northern Arizona water providers; analysis of differences between Tribal and non-tribal systems and rural and urban systems

name: Lessons from Past
resource_description: Analysis of how amendments to Arizona's general stream adjudication statutes would fare under constitutional scrutiny

resource_description: Landmark analysis of why the goals of Arizona's Groundwater Management Act have not been achieved

name: The Price of Uncertainty
resource_description: Explanation of Arizona's general stream adjudications and how delay in completing the adjudications negatively impacts rural communities

name: The Elusive Concept of an Assured Water Supply: The  Role of CAGRD and Replenishment
resource_description: Landmark analysis of the Central Arizona Groundwater Replenishment District; recommendations for policy reforms to address looming water supply and financial challenges arising from unchecked enrollment in the Central Arizona Groundwater Replenishment District

resource_description: Explainer on how Colorado River shortage will impact central Arizona including water conservation, residential water use, groundwater pumping, utility costs, urban growth, new water supplies and water rights
